2606.10087.title: CodeAlchemy: Synthetic Code Rewriting at Scale
2606.10087.paper_summary: Pre-training on raw code teaches syntax but provides sparse signal for diverse real-world task formats. While synthetic data has proven transformative for language models, code remains largely unexplored beyond limited quality improvements. We present CodeAlchemy, a synthetic data generation framework that transforms publicly sourced code into semantically-rich training data through 5 strategies: CodeEnhance (quality-aware rewriting), CodeQA (template-based problems), CodeDev (developer tasks), CodeDialogue (multi-turn conversations), and CodeTrace (execution traces). We process 3 corpora across 15 languages to generate 500B+ tokens of synthetic data plus 350B reasoning tokens, orders of magnitude more than prior efforts. CodeTrace instruments and executes 1.3M+ files across 14 languages and 5K libraries, capturing control flow, state tracking, and library knowledge. We introduce DevEval (developer tasks) and TraceEval (execution prediction) benchmarks; frontier models like Claude Sonnet 4.5 achieve only 5.6% exact match on TraceEval, revealing critical gaps in semantic understanding. Our 3B models achieve 83.5% on HumanEval, 63.2% on MBPP, 8.09% win rate on DevEval, and 15.36 ROUGE-2 on TraceEval, outperforming frontier models 10x the size including 27B Gemma-3 and 32B Granite-4.0.
2606.10087.paper_summary_zh: 預訓練原始代碼教會語法，但對於多樣化的現實世界任務格式提供的信號稀疏。雖然合成數據對於語言模型已證明具有變革性，但代碼在有限的質量改進之外仍然大多未被探索。我們提出了 CodeAlchemy，一個合成數據生成框架，通過五種策略將公開來源的代碼轉換為語義豐富的訓練數據：CodeEnhance（質量意識重寫）、CodeQA（基於模板的問題）、CodeDev（開發者任務）、CodeDialogue（多輪對話）和 CodeTrace（執行痕跡）。我們處理了 15 種語言的 3 個語料庫，生成了超過 5000 億個合成數據標記以及 350 億個推理標記，這是之前努力的數量級。CodeTrace 在 14 種語言和 5000 個庫中對 130 萬多個文件進行了儀器化和執行，捕捉控制流、狀態跟踪和庫知識。我們介紹了 DevEval（開發者任務）和 TraceEval（執行預測）基準；像 Claude Sonnet 4.5 這樣的前沿模型在 TraceEval 上僅達到 5.6% 的精確匹配，揭示了語義理解中的關鍵差距。我們的 30 億模型在 HumanEval 上達到 83.5%，在 MBPP 上達到 63.2%，在 DevEval 上的勝率為 8.09%，在 TraceEval 上的 ROUGE-2 為 15.36，超越了包括 270 億 Gemma-3 和 320 億 Granite-4.0 在內的前沿模型，規模是其 10 倍。
2606.10087.author: Ankit Gupta et.al.
2606.10087.authors: Ankit Gupta, Aditya Prasad, Rameswar Panda
